heading: Medicare coverage for individuals exposed to environmental health hazards
label: 1395rr–1 Medicare coverage for individuals exposed to environmental health hazards
notes: References in TextParts A and B, referred to in subsecs. (a)(3) and (b)(2), are classified to sections 1395c et seq. and 1395j et seq., respectively, of this title.

children.heading: Deeming of individuals as eligible for medicare benefits
children.label: a Deeming of individuals as eligible for medicare benefits

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For purposes of eligibility for benefits under this subchapter, an individual determined under subsection (c) to be an environmental exposure affected individual described in subsection (e)(2) shall be deemed to meet the conditions specified in .section 426(a) of this title

children.heading: Discretionary deeming
children.label: 2 Discretionary deeming
children.text: For purposes of eligibility for benefits under this subchapter, the Secretary may deem an individual determined under subsection (c) to be an environmental exposure affected individual described in subsection (e)(3) to meet the conditions specified in .section 426(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: entitled to benefits under the program under Part A as of the date of such deeming; and1

children.label: B
children.text: eligible to enroll in the program under Part B beginning with the month in which such deeming occurs.1

children.heading: Pilot program for care of certain individuals residing in emergency declaration areas
children.label: b Pilot program for care of certain individuals residing in emergency declaration areas

children.heading: Primary pilot program
children.label: A Primary pilot program
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a pilot program in accordance with this subsection to provide innovative approaches to furnishing comprehensive, coordinated, and cost-effective care under this subchapter to individuals described in paragraph (2)(A).

children.heading: Optional pilot programs
children.label: B Optional pilot programs
children.text: The Secretary may establish a separate pilot program, in accordance with this subsection, with respect to each geographic area subject to an emergency declaration (other than the declaration of ), in order to furnish such comprehensive, coordinated and cost-effective care to individuals described in subparagraph (2)(B) who reside in each such area.June 17, 2009

children.label: A
children.text: is an environmental exposure affected individual described in subsection (e)(2) who resides in or around the geographic area subject to an emergency declaration made as of ; orJune 17, 2009

children.label: i
children.text: is deemed under subsection (a)(2); and

children.label: ii
children.text: meets such other criteria or conditions for participation in a pilot program under paragraph (1)(B) as the Secretary specifies.

children.heading: Flexible benefits and services
children.label: 3 Flexible benefits and services
children.text: A pilot program under this subsection may provide for the furnishing of benefits, items, or services not otherwise covered or authorized under this subchapter, if the Secretary determines that furnishing such benefits, items, or services will further the purposes of such pilot program (as described in paragraph (1)).

children.label: A
children.text: shall develop and implement appropriate methodologies to reimburse providers for furnishing benefits, items, or services for which payment is not otherwise covered or authorized under this subchapter, if such benefits, items, or services are furnished pursuant to paragraph (3); and

children.label: B
children.text: may develop and implement innovative approaches to reimbursing providers for any benefits, items, or services furnished under this subsection.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 5 Limitation
children.text: Consistent with , no payment shall be made under the pilot program under this subsection with respect to benefits, items, or services furnished to an environmental exposure affected individual (as defined in subsection (e)) to the extent that such individual is eligible to receive such benefits, items, or services through any other public or private benefits plan or legal agreement.section 1395y(b) of this title

children.heading: Waiver authority
children.label: 6 Waiver authority
children.text: The Secretary may waive such provisions of this subchapter and subchapter XI as are necessary to carry out pilot programs under this subsection.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: 7 Funding
children.text: For purposes of carrying out pilot programs under this subsection, the Secretary shall provide for the transfer, from the Federal Hospital Insurance Trust Fund under and the Federal Supplementary Medical Insurance Trust Fund under , in such proportion as the Secretary determines appropriate, of such sums as the Secretary determines necessary, to the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services Program Management Account.section 1395i of this titlesection 1395t of this title

children.heading: Waiver of budget neutrality
children.label: 8 Waiver of budget neutrality
children.text: The Secretary shall not require that pilot programs under this subsection be budget neutral with respect to expenditures under this subchapter.

children.heading: By the Commissioner of Social Security
children.label: 1 By the Commissioner of Social Security
children.text: For purposes of this section, the Commissioner of Social Security, in consultation with the Secretary, and using the cost allocation method prescribed in , shall determine whether individuals are environmental exposure affected individuals.section 401(g) of this title

children.heading: By the Secretary
children.label: 2 By the Secretary
children.text: The Secretary shall determine eligibility for pilot programs under subsection (b).

children.heading: Emergency declaration defined
children.label: d Emergency declaration defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “emergency declaration” means a declaration of a public health emergency under .section 9604(a) of this title

children.heading: Environmental exposure affected individual defined
children.label: e Environmental exposure affected individual defined
A
children.text: an individual described in paragraph (2); and

children.label: B
children.text: an individual described in paragraph (3).

children.label: i
children.text: is diagnosed with 1 or more conditions described in subparagraph (B);

children.label: I
children.text: not less than 10 years prior to such diagnosis; and

children.label: II
children.text: prior to the implementation of all the remedial and removal actions specified in the Record of Decision for Operating Unit 4 and the Record of Decision for Operating Unit 7;

children.label: iii
children.text: files an application for benefits under this subchapter (or has an application filed on behalf of the individual), including pursuant to this section; and

children.label: iv
children.text: is determined under this section to meet the criteria in this subparagraph.

children.label: I
children.text: interpretation by a “B Reader” qualified physician of a plain chest x-ray or interpretation of a computed tomographic radiograph of the chest by a qualified physician, as determined by the Secretary; or

children.label: II
children.text: such other diagnostic standards as the Secretary specifies,

children.label: I
children.text: pathologic examination of biopsy tissue;

children.label: II
children.text: cytology from bronchioalveolar lavage; or

children.label: III
children.text: such other diagnostic standards as the Secretary specifies.

children.label: iii
children.text: Any other diagnosis which the Secretary, in consultation with the Commissioner of Social Security, determines is an asbestos-related medical condition, as established by such diagnostic standards as the Secretary specifies.

children.label: A
children.text: is not an individual described in paragraph (2);

children.label: B
children.text: is diagnosed with a medical condition caused by the exposure of the individual to a public health hazard to which an emergency declaration applies, based on such medical conditions, diagnostic standards, and other criteria as the Secretary specifies;

children.label: C
children.text: as demonstrated in such manner as the Secretary determines appropriate, has been present for an aggregate total of 6 months in the geographic area subject to the emergency declaration involved, during a period determined appropriate by the Secretary;

children.label: D
children.text: files an application for benefits under this subchapter (or has an application filed on behalf of the individual), including pursuant to this section; and

children.label: E
children.text: is determined under this section to meet the criteria in this paragraph.
